39.reason: [This prints "error " but then the function is expected to return an ElemType. In C, reaching the end of a non-void function without returning a value leads to undefined behavior. Moreover, the caller in main() always prints the return value with "%d ", so even when error is printed here, the caller will print additional garbage. The function should not print and return; instead, it should signal error differently or the caller should handle output exclusively.]
